title: Breakpoints and Step-by-Step Execution Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on advanced browser debugging techniques.

questions.question: Regarding the debugging of web applications, what is a 'Breakpoint' used for?
options: To pause your application's code execution at a specific line for manual inspection

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of stepping through your code manualy during a debugging session?
options: Observing exactly how your application's status and data changes at each line of code
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
